sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8663" key="a)nh/pustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνήπυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἠπυω</etym>) <sense id="n8663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unheard of,</tr_> dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
